TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Cicala'ay, title = Cicala'ay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cicala'ay} }

S.FORM: Cicala'ay Itiniay i Chishang Cen no Taitung ko Cicala'ay a niyaro', 537 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,368 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 23% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 309 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 77% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,059 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 18%, Bunun 2%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ¶i ¶a…ĺa °aj itiniaj i ¶ńßisńßaŇč ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u ¶i ¶a…ĺa °aj a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Cicala'ay Itiniay i Chishang Cen no Taitung ko Cicala'ay a niyaro', 537 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,368 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 23% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 309 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 77% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,059 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 18%, Bunun 2%, Paiwan 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ¶i ¶a…ĺa °aj itiniaj i ¶ńßisńßaŇč ¶…ôn no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u ¶i ¶a…ĺa °aj a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, paiwan *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~u °.
